etymology.description: semantic 氵(水) (shuǐ, "water") + phonetic 尃(尃) (fū)
etymology.interpretation: The character 溥 combines the semantic element 氵(水) (shuǐ, "water") indicating a connection to liquid or fluidity, with the phonetic 尃(尃) (fū), suggesting the sound and possibly denoting something widely spread, like water covering a vast area.
